extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by versus against: I counted the Against Company, Against Directors and Against Promoters rows for criminal proceedings (1+1+1), while excluding all By Company/By Directors/By Promoters rows; statutory/regulatory proceedings are nil in every against row, and tax proceedings against the Company and Subsidiaries are also nil. For the aggregate amount against the Company and its Subsidiaries, I used the stated Against Company amount of ₹292.31 million and excluded the Company’s By amount of ₹0.86 million, promoter/director matters, and unquantifiable amounts; this converts to ₹29.231 crore. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated Total of ₹17.63 million as of September 30, 2023, not a re-sum, converting to ₹1.763 crore. The only concentration percentages disclosed are business/location or specialty-segment figures, not company-wide top-five or top-ten customer revenue percentages; the source tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
